headline: The agent is performing reliably with consistent success but shows issues with zero latency and missing model data.

working.summary: Consistent success status across all traces indicating reliable performance.

broken.summary: Zero latency recorded in several traces, indicating potential logging or processing issues.
Missing model data in several traces, which could affect performance analysis.
